'''Hart Daele''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
Hart Daele was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and also a theoretical mathematician.<ref name="DHP" /> He was capable of using the largely unknown [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] [[Instinctive Astrogation Control|instinctive astrogation control]], authoring a doctoral thesis on the subject, proving that Jedi [[Meditation/Legends|meditation]] techniques were capable of solving (or, in special circumstances, approximating) the high-order equations necessary for [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]].<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>

Daele played [[Divoran holochess|Divoran Holochess]] with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Haaran Balmor]] over the course of forty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] via the use of [[Projective Telepathy]]. At one point, Daele was stationed in [[Samarine Province]], playing against Balmor who was living seven [[Parsec/Legends|kiloparsecs]] away on the planet [[Damualer Triac]]. Balmor's memories of Daele and the holochess game where recorded in the [[Book/Legends|book]] ''[[Heroes Of The Republic]]'' by [[Madelein Aurin]].<ref name="DHP" />
